title: Session Handoff
description: Create factual continuation artifacts from actual repo state, commands, failing evidence, and remaining decisions without inventing complete
body: Create factual continuation artifacts from actual repo state, commands, failing evidence, and remaining decisions without inventing completed work. Workflow: read binding roadmap and source, inspect relevant implementation, identify owner package, verify generated artifacts and acceptance coverage, then report exact evidence. Non-goals: placeholders, shallow descriptions, or docs that are not backed by code.
